Uses of Interface
org.ddolib.common.dominance.NoLayerDominanceChecker

Packages that use NoLayerDominanceChecker
Package
Description
org.ddolib.common.dominance
This package contains the classes implementing dominance checkers.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.misp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsptw
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Window (TSPTW) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer

    Methods in org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer that return NoLayerDominanceChecker
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default NoLayerDominanceChecker<T>
    DdoModel.dominance()
    Returns a dominance checker to prune inferior states during compilation.
    default NoLayerDominanceChecker<T>
    Model.dominance()
    Returns the dominance checker used to prune dominated states.
